name: Rocky Road Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 can Marachino cherries, drained and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9 inch pan with foil, letting the ends extend at least 2 inches above the narrow sides of the pan.
2. Melt chocolate chips in a medium-sized saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently.
3. Remove from heat and stir in butter until melted.
4. Stir in sweetened condensed milk until blended.
5. Add peanuts, mini-marshmallows, and cherries.
6. Spread mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Refrigerate for 8 hours or until firm enough to cut.
8. Lift foil by the ends onto a cutting board.
9. Cut fudge into 1-inch squares.
10. Store in waxed paper between layers in an airtight container.
